title: Can You Spot the Optimal Trade Entry? 🧠
description: Four funded accounts. All from this one concept. Test your ICT knowledge and see if you can identify the optimal trade entry. This is the smart money concept separating winning traders from losing ones. Drop your answer in the comments! #R2FTrading #ICTTrading #FairValueGap #OrderBlocks #SmartMoneyConcepts #FundedTrader #ForexQuiz #ICTConcepts #OptimalTradeEntry #SmartMoney
script: Four funded accounts. All from ONE concept. Can YOU spot the optimal entry? Price sweeps a high. Drops into a Fair Value Gap. What do YOU do? A) Short immediately. B) Wait for OB + FVG confluence. C) Skip the trade. Answer: B. OB plus FVG confluence. That's the Optimal Trade Entry. That's where smart money executes. Master this. Change your trading. Follow R2F Trading for daily setups like this.
